message:
fix(dolt): re-init schema after branch checkout for untracked tables

Untracked tables (wisps, wisp_*) exist only in the working set due to
dolt_ignore. When BD_BRANCH triggers a branch checkout, these tables
are lost because they were never committed. Re-running initSchema on
the working branch recreates them. This also ensures schema_version
is set on the branch, preventing the fast-path from being skipped.

Fixes schema parity tests that were failing under BD_BRANCH.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
